title: Make a Wish
writer: Gertrude Berg, Bernard Schubert, Earle Snell
actors: Bobby Breen, Basil Rathbone, Marion Claire
plot: While at summer camp in the Maine woods, little Bobby Breen befriends composer Basil Rathbone, who left the city to try and break his creative block, and is soon playing matchmaker for his widowed singer mother and Rathbone.
